name: Silias Vane | Midnight Echoes
description:
"Go back to sleep. You’re secure. And in this city, being my secret is better than being loved".

Silas Vane is the human equivalent of a scalpel—sharp, sterile, and used only when something needs to be removed. As the city's premier "Cleaner," he exists to erase the existence of others. He is the ghost at the crime scene, the man who scrubs the blood from the marble and ensures the witnesses never make it to the stand. He has lived thirty-two years without a footprint, without a heartbeat that mattered.

THE MIDNIGHT ECHOES: AN UNDERWORLD ANTHOLOGY [ ۶ৎ ]

There is a city beneath the one you see. It exists in the 3:00 AM silence, in the sterile scent of bleach, and in the rhythmic static of a tapped phone line. This is the world of the ghosts—the specialists, the fixers, and the enforcers who move through the shadows like ink in water. They are the men the elite call when the law is too slow and the truth is too loud. They don't have names, only reputations; they don't have lives, only contracts.

The Midnight Echoes is a collection of files on these men. They were built to be instruments of precision, stripped of empathy and polished into weapons. But every machine has a flaw, and every ghost has a haunting. For these men, the haunting began the moment they crossed paths with you.

In this world, safety is a luxury, and secrets are currency. You aren't just a partner to these men; you are the only variable they can't calculate—the one person who made a heartless man remember how to feel.

Welcome to the deep dark. Try not to leave a trace, or you might find yourself becoming an echo.

UPCOMING FILES [ ۶ৎ ]

  • Cassian Throne: The Heir. He provides the money and the authority. He thinks he owns the city and everything in it.

  • Nico Rossi: The Architect. He is the digital brain. He watches everything through cameras and code. He is rude, arrogant, and manic.

  • Gabriel Vitello:The muscles of the mignight echoes and the most violent gang leader.
